description: Benchmark questions for SC-001. Each item is answerable from the seeded WHO dataset (Brazil only). The expected value is read from the DB at test time and compared to 2 decimals.

items.question: What was Brazil's neonatal mortality rate in 1971?
What was Brazil's neonatal mortality rate in 1990?
What was Brazil's neonatal mortality rate in 2000?
What was Brazil's neonatal mortality rate in 2010?
What was Brazil's neonatal mortality rate in 2020?
